old_value: {"id":"smallhold-naww.20","title":"webauthn.rs: register endpoint has no rate limiting","description":"File: src/webauthn.rs (register_begin, register_complete, auth_begin, auth_complete). The /admin/webauthn/register/begin endpoint accepts admin password in plaintext without rate limiting. An attacker can brute-force the admin password via this endpoint. The /oauth/authorize endpoint has rate limiting (the diff shows it checks at line 584), but the webauthn registration endpoints bypass it entirely.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"mark@wolfssl.com","created_at":"2026-07-18T22:40:31.812293878Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-18T22:40:31.812293878Z","labels":["rust-idiom","review"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"smallhold-naww.20","depends_on_id":"smallhold-naww","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-18T22:40:31.84063027Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}
